name: med-platform
description: India-first multilingual clinical multi-agent platform monorepo

scripts.dev:doctor-agent: npm run build -w @med-platform/clinical-specialties && npm run build -w @med-platform/agent-orchestrator && npm run start -w doctor-agent
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:medisuite" "npm run dev:mediscribe" "npm run dev:medipal" "npm run dev:gluco-vital"
